shared_patterns.pattern: repeated structure of stating a problem followed by a request for help
informal greeting at the beginning of the text (e.g., 'hey', 'hi')
requests for help or clarification
expressions of frustration or confusion
use of casual language and punctuation (e.g., 'it just won't go through', 'help?')
mention of specific issues related to app functionality
use of a casual opener like 'hi team' or 'quick one'
direct questions about technical issues or features
concise, straightforward structure with minimal elaboration
use of specific technical terms (e.g., 'api', 'checkout', 'safari')
common issue reporting format (e.g., 'won't open', 'nothing happens')
exclamatory opener
complex sentence structures with multiple clauses
questions about refunds or account issues
use of conversational language and informal tone
longer, more complex sentences with multiple clauses
use of specific details like 'weeks ago' and 'order number'
frequent use of polite requests for assistance
inclusion of emotional expressions like 'i can't believe this happened!'

direct requests for refunds or cancellations
concise and to-the-point statements
use of technical jargon (e.g., '502', 'logs attached')
repetitive sentence structures (e.g., 'i want', 'i ordered')
